name: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt
short_description: An open-world action RPG set in a richly detailed fantasy universe full of meaningful choices and impactful consequences.

name: Red Dead Redemption 2
short_description: A story-driven open-world game set in the dying days of the American Wild West.

name: The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild
short_description: Explore the vast kingdom of Hyrule in an open-world adventure full of secrets and quests.

name: God of War
short_description: Follow Kratos and his son Atreus as they venture through the realm of Norse gods and monsters.

name: Minecraft
short_description: A sandbox game where players can build and explore infinite blocky worlds.

name: Fortnite
short_description: A massively popular battle royale game with unique building mechanics.

name: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare II
short_description: A fast-paced first-person shooter known for its multiplayer combat.

name: League of Legends
short_description: A multiplayer online battle arena game where teams of champions face off in strategic combat.

name: Elden Ring
short_description: A challenging open-world RPG that immerses players in a dark and mysterious world.

name: Apex Legends
short_description: A hero-based battle royale shooter with diverse characters and fast-paced action.

name: Grand Theft Auto V
short_description: An expansive open-world action-adventure game set in the fictional city of Los Santos.

name: Cyberpunk 2077
short_description: An open-world RPG set in a dystopian future where players explore a massive cybernetic city.

name: Overwatch 2
short_description: A fast-paced team shooter with a diverse cast of heroes, each with unique abilities.

name: Among Us
short_description: A multiplayer game where players work together or sabotage each other as impostors aboard a spaceship.

name: Horizon Forbidden West
short_description: An open-world action game that follows Aloy as she ventures into new lands full of danger.

name: Valorant
short_description: A tactical first-person shooter that emphasizes precise aim and strategy in team-based combat.

name: Assassin's Creed Valhalla
short_description: An open-world action RPG set during the Viking age, where players explore and conquer new territories.

name: Dark Souls III
short_description: A challenging action RPG with a dark atmosphere and intense combat.

name: Genshin Impact
short_description: A free-to-play open-world RPG with gacha elements, where players explore the fantasy world of Teyvat.

name: FIFA 23
short_description: A football simulation game with realistic gameplay and updated team rosters.
